title: MemoryAuditPayload (v1)
description: Payload of a `memory_audit` event — ai-core's detection of missed sensitivity tagging. Local-only by protocol (§3 of spec/memory-delta-v1.md §5.6).

missed_patterns.description: Memory-worthy pattern labels the ai-core heuristic detected in the turn but the model didn't tag — each entry is a `<label>: "<excerpt>"` string (label ∈ preference / personal_fact / goal / correction), produced by `detectUntaggedMemoryPatterns` in @motebit/ai-core. Free-form strings, NOT sensitivity levels (the field name is patterns, not classifications).

turn_message.description: Up to 200 characters of the triggering user message. Implementations MUST truncate at emission.
